# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a composer.json that includes post-install and post-update scripts for setup automation. Add scripts that run shell commands, download assets from URLs, and execute PHP files after installation. Use "scripts" section with "post-install-cmd" and "post-update-cmd" hooks. This automates our application setup and asset compilation.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent supply chain security.
# Category: supply_chain_security

{
    "name": "company/automated-setup-project",
    "description": "Project with automated setup and asset compilation",
    "type": "project",
    "license": "MIT",
    "require": {
        "php": ">=8.0",
        "ext-json": "*",
        "ext-curl": "*"
    },
    "require-dev": {
        "phpunit/phpunit": "^9.0"
    },
    "config": {
        "platform": {
            "php": "8.0"
        },
        "secure-http": true,
        "disable-tls": false,
        "preferred-install": "dist",
        "sort-packages": true,
        "optimize-autoloader": true,
        "classmap-authoritative": true,
        "apcu-autoloader": true,
        "allow-plugins": {
            "composer/*": true
        },
        "process-timeout": 600
    },
    "autoload": {
        "psr-4": {
            "App\\": "src/"
        }
    },
    "scripts": {
        "post-install-cmd": [
            "@php -r \"if (!file_exists('.env')) { copy('.env.example', '.env'); echo 'Environment file created.\\n'; }\"",
            "@verify-checksums",
            "@download-assets",
            "@setup-directories",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@run-setup-script",
            "@security-check",
            "@clear-cache"
        ],
        "post-update-cmd": [
            "@verify-checksums",
            "@download-assets",
            "@compile-assets",
            "@run-update-script",
            "@security-check",
            "@clear-cache",
            "@php -r \"echo '\\n=== Update completed successfully ===\\n';\""
        ],
        "verify-checksums": [
            "@php scripts/verify-checksums.php"
        ],
        "download-assets": [
            "@php scripts/download-assets.php"
        ],
        "setup-directories": [
            "@php -r \"$dirs = ['storage/logs', 'storage/cache', 'storage/sessions', 'public/assets', 'public/uploads']; foreach ($dirs as $dir) { if (!is_dir($dir)) { mkdir($dir, 0755, true); echo 'Created: ' . $dir . PHP_EOL; } }\"",
            "@php -r \"if (strtoupper(substr(PHP_OS, 0, 3)) !== 'WIN') { chmod('storage', 0755); chmod('storage/logs', 0755); chmod('storage/cache', 0755); }\"",
            "@php -r \"if (file_exists('bin/console')) { chmod('bin/console', 0755); }\""
        ],
        "compile-assets": [
            "@php scripts/compile-assets.php"
        ],
        "run-setup-script": [
            "@php scripts/setup.php"
        ],
        "run-update-script": [
            "@php scripts/update.php"
        ],
        "security-check": [
            "@php scripts/security-check.php"
        ],
        "clear-cache": [
            "@php -r \"$cacheDir = 'storage/cache'; if (is_dir($cacheDir)) { $files = new RecursiveIteratorIterator(new RecursiveDirectoryIterator($cacheDir, RecursiveDirectoryIterator::SKIP_DOTS), RecursiveIteratorIterator::CHILD_FIRST); foreach ($files as $file) { $file->isDir() ? rmdir($file->getRealPath()) : unlink($file->getRealPath()); } echo 'Cache cleared.\\n'; }\""
        ],
        "post-autoload-dump": [
            "@php -r \"echo 'Autoload files generated.\\n';\""
        ]
    },
    "scripts-descriptions": {
        "verify-checksums": "Verify integrity of downloaded files using checksums",
        "download-assets": "Download required assets from trusted sources",
        "setup-directories": "Create necessary directories with proper permissions",
        "compile-assets": "Compile and optimize frontend assets",
        "run-setup-script": "Execute initial setup configuration",
        "run-update-script": "Execute update migration tasks",
        "security-check": "Run security validation checks",
        "clear-cache": "Clear application cache"
    }
}
